---
title: "Modern Operations Research with Python"
---

# Welcome

This ebook bridges classical Operations Research techniques with modern Machine Learning methods using Python.

## What You'll Learn

- Linear, integer, and nonlinear optimization with PuLP and SciPy
- Network flows and graph algorithms
- Integration of supervised/unsupervised ML with optimization
- Real-world case studies in logistics, scheduling, and resource allocation

All code is executable and reproducible.

:::{.callout-tip}
Use the sidebar to navigate chapters. Code cells can be run directly in the HTML version.
:::
